summary: A Go-based monolith that acts as a test runner and Goss configuration migrator, leveraging MCP handlers and heavily utilizing AI agents for automated test generation.
patterns: Standard Go project layout (cmd/, internal/, bin/)
concerns: Build failure in GOrchestra/glm-agents/0011-tests-internalreportertapgo-fi/context/tap.go due to undefined TestResult type
Highly fragmented test generation across 15+ agent directories suggests potential test coherence issues
Heavy reliance on automated test generation agents may introduce brittle or redundant tests
suggestions: Fix the undefined TestResult type in the tap.go context file to resolve the build error
Consolidate and validate the AI-generated tests to ensure they provide meaningful coverage without redundancy
Review the MCP handlers and runner logic as they appear to be the core domain components
